rag_rules: Place component type contracts (assumptions, guarantees) in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes.
Use AADL model as the authoritative source for component structure.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks.
Use case-provided bounds and visible feature names for range assumptions/guarantees.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq <variable> : bool = <expression>;` to define Boolean helper variables.
Ensure AGREE expression types match AADL port types (bool, int, real).
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions without explicit ports/constants.
